Est. in Wayanad
Our Story

A Peaceful Escape In The Heart Of Wayanad

Nestled within the lush embrace of Wayanad's forests, Wood Shade Resort is a sanctuary where nature and luxury exist in perfect harmony. Every pathway, every room, every sunrise here is designed to reconnect you with the world around you — unhurried, authentic, and beautifully alive.

Our wood-inspired architecture draws from the landscape itself, creating spaces that feel both refined and rooted. Whether you come seeking solitude, a family retreat, or a romantic escape, Wood Shade offers an experience that lingers long after you leave.

Forest Setting

Surrounded by Wayanad's dense greenery

Wood Architecture

Warm, nature-inspired design

Scenic Pool

Open-air pool with forest views

Premium Stays

Thoughtfully crafted rooms

Where You Stay

Luxury Rooms Crafted For Comfort

Each room at Wood Shade is a retreat within a retreat — rich wooden interiors, panoramic forest views, and every comfort you deserve.

Scenic View

Forest View Suite

Immerse yourself in panoramic Wayanad greenery from your private balcony. Spacious interiors with warm wood finishes and modern comforts await.

Forest ViewPrivate BalconyPremium Linen
Signature Stay

Treehouse Cabin

An elevated escape perched above the canopy. Our signature treehouse cabin delivers an intimate, adventurous stay unlike anything else in Wayanad.

Elevated ViewWood InteriorNature Deck
Pool Access

Pool Villa Room

Wake up to glistening pool waters framed by tropical trees. This room offers direct access to our open-air pool and the best of outdoor living.

The Experience

The Wood Shade Experience

Life at Wood Shade moves at its own gentle pace. Mornings begin with birdsong and mist rolling across the hills. Days unfold around the pool, forest walks, and long, unhurried meals. Evenings glow warm with lantern light and the quiet of the trees.

  • Sunrise dips in our open-air forest pool
  • Evening walks along our lantern-lit garden paths
  • Relaxation on private balconies overlooking the canopy
  • Family activities on lush green lawns
  • Archery and outdoor adventure experiences
  • Authentic Kerala cuisine in a scenic setting
Reserve Your Stay
Discover Wayanad

Kerala's Most Beautiful Corner

Wayanad is a world apart — where spice-laden air, misty mornings, and ancient forests come together in one extraordinary landscape. Wood Shade Resort sits at the heart of it all, your perfect base for exploring everything this magical region offers.

  • Verdant hills and forest roads of Mananthavady
  • Fresh highland climate year-round
  • Sunrise and mist over the Western Ghats
  • Nature trails through Kerala's biodiversity
  • Authentic village culture and local cuisine
  • Wildlife sanctuaries and forest reserves nearby

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"An absolutely magical experience. The treehouse cabin felt like living inside the forest itself. The pool views at sunset were something we will never forget."

Arjun & Priya M.
Bangalore, Karnataka
★★★★★

"Wood Shade is the most beautiful resort we have stayed at in Wayanad. The wooden interiors, lush greenery, and warm hospitality made it truly special."

Rahul Nair
Kochi, Kerala
★★★★★

"Our family trip to Wood Shade was the highlight of the year. The kids loved the open lawn and pool, while we enjoyed the peace of the forest. Perfect in every way."

The Krishnamurthy Family
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
★★★★★

"Breathtaking views, immaculate rooms, and staff who genuinely care. Wood Shade Resort is the definition of luxury in the wild. Already planning our return visit."

Divya & Rohit K.
Pune, Maharashtra
★★★★★

"Woke up to mist over the mountains and evenings by the pool surrounded by trees. This is exactly the kind of escape I had been dreaming of. Truly incredible."

Sneha Varghese
Trivandrum, Kerala
